summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the /book page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 9 sections, auto-redirect, floating button, mobile sticky bar, SEO, and design tokens verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Book page (/book) fully tested and working. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component and useSchemas hook. All 5 booking links point to correct HouseCallPro URL. Auto-redirect at /book?go=1 works (redirects to external booking URL). Mobile sticky bar visible at <768px. Floating button appears after 300px scroll.

hero_section.details: Background image with dark overlay (#0D1B2A at 94% opacity), breadcrumb 'Home → Book Online', eyebrow 'SAME-DAY & NEXT-DAY AVAILABLE', H1 'Book Your Appliance Repair', sub-text, 'Book Online Now' CTA (links to HouseCallPro URL, target=_blank), or-divider, phone link (760) 543-5733, 4 trust badges (Licensed CA #51001, $60 Diagnostic, 180-Day Warranty, 4.9★ 87 Reviews)

how_it_works_section.details: 4 steps with cream background cards and orange top border. Ghost numbers 1-4. Steps: Pick a Time, We Confirm, $60 Diagnostic, Fixed Same Day

booking_widget_section.details: Centered white card with orange top border. Title 'FixitBay LLC', subtitle 'Licensed Appliance Repair'. 3 mini trust items ($60 Diagnostic, Same-Day, 180-Day Warranty). Full-width 'Open Booking Calendar' button (links to HouseCallPro). Divider with 'prefer to call?'. Phone button. Hours note: Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 8AM-3PM

why_book_section.details: Dark navy background (#0D1B2A). 2x2 grid of cards with navy-mid background (#1A2F45). Ghost numbers 01-04. Cards: No Surprise Fees, Licensed Technician, 180-Day Warranty, Same-Day Service

reviews_section.details: Cream background. 3 review cards with 5-star ratings, quotes, reviewer initials in orange circles, names and locations: Sarah M./Pacific Heights, James L./Sunset District, Linda K./SOMA

faq_section.details: 6 FAQ accordion items that open/close on click. Questions about booking, same-day service, diagnostic fee, rescheduling, service areas, multi-visit repairs

final_cta_section.details: Orange background (#FF5722). Title 'Ready to Book?'. Sub-text about same-day/next-day. Two buttons: 'Book Online Now' (white bg, links to HouseCallPro) and phone (outline style)

footer_section.details: Navy background. Links: All Services (/services), Brands (/brands), Service Areas (/service-areas), Reviews (/reviews). FixitBay logo, phone (760) 543-5733, © 2026 FixitBay LLC

floating_button.details: Hidden initially, appears after 300px scroll. Orange background, 'BOOK REPAIR' text, links to HouseCallPro URL. Position: fixed bottom-right (moves up to bottom-72px on mobile)

mobile_sticky_bar.details: Visible at viewport < 768px. Fixed at bottom. Three buttons: CALL (tel link), BOOK ONLINE (HouseCallPro URL), TEXT US (sms link). Navy background with orange top border

auto_redirect.details: /book?go=1 redirects to external HouseCallPro booking URL. Redirect happens via window.location.assign after 20ms. Fallback button appears after 2s if redirect blocked. Verified by screenshot showing HouseCallPro zip code entry page

booking_urls.details: All 5 booking links point to exact URL: https://book.housecallpro.com/book/FixitBay-LLC/336ac28909f0491299d659eae174f93e?v2=true. Links found: hero CTA, widget book button, final CTA button, floating button, mobile bar book button

seo_meta_tags.details: Title: 'Book Appliance Repair Online — Same-Day SF Bay Area | FixitBay LLC'. Meta description contains San Francisco, appliance repair. Canonical: https://fixitbay.net/book. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component

json_ld_schema.details: Service schema with @type: Service, provider (LocalBusiness FixitBay LLC), areaServed (San Francisco Bay Area), availableChannel, offers ($60 diagnostic)

font_family.details: Montserrat font loaded via @import, applied to all .bk-page elements
